---
title: "Supplementary Figure Statistics Tables"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
params:
  fig_dir: "results/figs"
  manual_root: "artifacts/manual"
  runtime_hash: "97411c0ec4"
  output_dir: "artifacts/manual/supplementary_figure_statistics"
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
.three-line-table {
  border-collapse: collapse;
  border-top: 2px solid #222;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #222;
  width: 100%;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
}
.three-line-table thead {
  border-bottom: 1.4px solid #222;
}
.three-line-table th,
.three-line-table td {
  padding: 0.28rem 0.45rem;
  vertical-align: top;
}
.three-line-table caption {
  caption-side: top;
  text-align: left;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

if (!requireNamespace("openxlsx", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("Missing required package 'openxlsx'. Install it with: install.packages('openxlsx')")
}

common_candidates <- c("_common.R", file.path("scripts", "_common.R"))
common_path <- common_candidates[file.exists(common_candidates)][1]
if (is.na(common_path)) {
  stop("Could not find scripts/_common.R from the render working directory.")
}
source(common_path)

detect_repo_root <- function() {
  candidates <- c(getwd(), file.path(getwd(), ".."), file.path(getwd(), "..", ".."))
  for (candidate in candidates) {
    if (file.exists(file.path(candidate, "pyproject.toml"))) {
      return(normalizePath(candidate, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
    }
  }
  normalizePath(getwd(), winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
}

repo_root <- detect_repo_root()

is_absolute_path <- function(path) {
  grepl("^[A-Za-z]:[/\\\\]|^/", path)
}

resolve_repo_path <- function(path, must_exist = TRUE) {
  if (is.null(path) || !nzchar(path)) {
    if (must_exist) {
      stop("A non-empty path parameter is required.")
    }
    return("")
  }
  candidates <- if (is_absolute_path(path)) {
    c(path)
  } else {
    c(file.path(repo_root, path), path, file.path("..", path))
  }
  if (must_exist) {
    for (candidate in candidates) {
      if (file.exists(candidate)) {
        return(normalizePath(candidate, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
      }
    }
    stop(paste("Could not resolve required path:", path))
  }
  for (candidate in candidates) {
    if (file.exists(candidate)) {
      return(normalizePath(candidate, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
    }
  }
  normalizePath(candidates[[1]], winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
}

sanitize_sheet_name <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub("[\\[\\]\\*\\?/\\\\:]", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("\\s+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("_+", "_", x)
  x <- trimws(x)
  if (!nzchar(x)) {
    x <- "Sheet"
  }
  substr(x, 1, 31)
}

make_unique_sheet_names <- function(x) {
  out <- character(length(x))
  used <- character()
  for (i in seq_along(x)) {
    base <- sanitize_sheet_name(x[[i]])
    candidate <- base
    suffix_id <- 2L
    while (candidate %in% used) {
      suffix <- paste0("_", suffix_id)
      candidate <- paste0(substr(base, 1, max(1, 31 - nchar(suffix))), suffix)
      suffix_id <- suffix_id + 1L
    }
    out[[i]] <- candidate
    used <- c(used, candidate)
  }
  out
}

to_repo_relative <- function(path) {
  if (is.null(path) || length(path) < 1 || !nzchar(path[[1]])) {
    return("")
  }
  path <- gsub("\\\\", "/", path)
  normalized <- normalizePath(path, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
  root <- paste0(gsub("\\\\", "/", repo_root), "/")
  starts <- startsWith(tolower(normalized), tolower(root))
  ifelse(starts, substring(normalized, nchar(root) + 1), normalized)
}

path_list <- function(paths) {
  paths <- paths[!is.na(paths) & nzchar(paths)]
  if (length(paths) == 0) {
    return("")
  }
  paste(vapply(paths, to_repo_relative, character(1)), collapse = "; ")
}

find_optional_file <- function(pattern) {
  patterns <- if (is_absolute_path(pattern)) {
    c(pattern)
  } else {
    c(file.path(repo_root, pattern), pattern, file.path("..", pattern))
  }
  matches <- unique(unlist(lapply(patterns, Sys.glob), use.names = FALSE))
  matches <- matches[file.exists(matches)]
  if (length(matches) == 0) {
    return("")
  }
  normalizePath(sort(matches)[[1]], winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
}

read_checked_csv <- function(path, required_cols, label, required = TRUE) {
  resolved <- tryCatch(
    resolve_repo_path(path, must_exist = TRUE),
    error = function(e) ""
  )
  if (!nzchar(resolved)) {
    if (required) {
      stop(paste("Missing required CSV for", label, ":", path))
    }
    return(NULL)
  }
  df <- read.csv(resolved, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop(paste(label, "is missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  attr(df, "source_path") <- resolved
  df
}

read_required_csv <- function(path, required_cols, label) {
  read_checked_csv(path, required_cols, label, required = TRUE)
}

read_optional_csv <- function(path, required_cols, label) {
  read_checked_csv(path, required_cols, label, required = FALSE)
}

select_existing <- function(df, columns) {
  df[, intersect(columns, names(df)), drop = FALSE]
}

integerish <- function(x) {
  values <- x[is.finite(x)]
  length(values) > 0 && all(abs(values - round(values)) < 1e-8)
}

is_count_col <- function(name) {
  grepl("(^n_|_n$|count|rank|order|sample|subjects|patients|rows|cols|id$|state$|microstate$|archetype$|peak_id|stage_order|total_|min_duration_ms)", name, ignore.case = TRUE)
}

format_number <- function(x, digits = 3) {
  ifelse(
    is.na(x) | !is.finite(x),
    "",
    formatC(x, format = "f", digits = digits)
  )
}

format_p_value <- function(x) {
  ifelse(
    is.na(x) | !is.finite(x),
    "",
    ifelse(x < 0.001, "<0.001", formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 3))
  )
}

format_q_value <- function(x) {
  ifelse(
    is.na(x) | !is.finite(x),
    "",
    ifelse(x < 0.001, "<0.001", formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 3))
  )
}

format_mixed_value <- function(x, digits = 3) {
  if (is.na(x) || length(x) < 1) {
    return("")
  }
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    return(format_number(x, digits = digits))
  }
  numeric_value <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  if (!is.na(numeric_value) && is.finite(numeric_value) && grepl("^-?[0-9.]+([eE][-+]?[0-9]+)?$", as.character(x))) {
    return(format_number(numeric_value, digits = digits))
  }
  as.character(x)
}

round_numeric_columns <- function(df) {
  for (column in names(df)) {
    if (!is.numeric(df[[column]])) {
      next
    }
    digits <- if (grepl("(^p_|p_value|p_perm|q_|q_fdr)", column, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
      4
    } else if (is_count_col(column) || integerish(df[[column]])) {
      0
    } else {
      3
    }
    df[[column]] <- round(df[[column]], digits)
  }
  df
}

format_display_table <- function(df) {
  display <- df
  for (column in names(display)) {
    if (!is.numeric(display[[column]])) {
      next
    }
    if (grepl("(^p_|p_value|p_perm)", column, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
      display[[column]] <- format_p_value(display[[column]])
    } else if (grepl("(^q_|q_fdr)", column, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
      display[[column]] <- format_q_value(display[[column]])
    } else if (is_count_col(column) || integerish(display[[column]])) {
      display[[column]] <- ifelse(is.na(display[[column]]), "", as.character(round(display[[column]])))
    } else {
      display[[column]] <- format_number(display[[column]], digits = 3)
    }
  }
  display
}

as_logical_flag <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) {
    return(x)
  }
  tolower(as.character(x)) %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y")
}

safe_mean <- function(x) {
  values <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(values) == 0) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  mean(values)
}

safe_sd <- function(x) {
  values <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(values) < 2) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  sd(values)
}

safe_median <- function(x) {
  values <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(values) == 0) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  median(values)
}

safe_quantile <- function(x, prob) {
  values <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(values) == 0) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  unname(quantile(values, probs = prob, na.rm = TRUE))
}

table_registry <- list()
manifest_rows <- list()

append_manifest <- function(
  table_id,
  status,
  figure_file,
  panel_label,
  table_title,
  caption,
  source_csv_path,
  output_csv_path,
  n_rows,
  n_cols,
  notes
) {
  manifest_rows[[length(manifest_rows) + 1]] <<- data.frame(
    table_id = table_id,
    status = status,
    figure_file = figure_file,
    panel_label = panel_label,
    table_title = table_title,
    caption = caption,
    source_csv_path = path_list(source_csv_path),
    output_csv_path = ifelse(nzchar(output_csv_path), to_repo_relative(output_csv_path), ""),
    n_rows = n_rows,
    n_cols = n_cols,
    notes = notes,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

write_supplement_table <- function(
  table_id,
  figure_file,
  panel_label,
  table_title,
  caption,
  source_csv_path,
  df,
  notes = ""
) {
  output_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(table_id, ".csv"))
  export_df <- round_numeric_columns(as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
  write.csv(export_df, output_path, row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
  table_registry[[table_id]] <<- list(
    table_id = table_id,
    figure_file = figure_file,
    panel_label = panel_label,
    table_title = table_title,
    caption = caption,
    source_csv_path = source_csv_path,
    output_csv_path = output_path,
    data = export_df,
    notes = notes
  )
  append_manifest(
    table_id = table_id,
    status = "generated",
    figure_file = figure_file,
    panel_label = panel_label,
    table_title = table_title,
    caption = caption,
    source_csv_path = source_csv_path,
    output_csv_path = output_path,
    n_rows = nrow(export_df),
    n_cols = ncol(export_df),
    notes = notes
  )
  invisible(output_path)
}

register_skipped_table <- function(
  table_id,
  figure_file,
  panel_label,
  table_title,
  caption,
  source_csv_path,
  notes
) {
  append_manifest(
    table_id = table_id,
    status = "skipped_optional_source_unavailable",
    figure_file = figure_file,
    panel_label = panel_label,
    table_title = table_title,
    caption = caption,
    source_csv_path = source_csv_path,
    output_csv_path = "",
    n_rows = 0,
    n_cols = 0,
    notes = notes
  )
}

write_figure_workbook <- function(figure_file, figure_label, entries) {
  if (length(entries) == 0) {
    return(data.frame())
  }
  workbook_path <- file.path(
    output_dir,
    paste0(tools::file_path_sans_ext(figure_file), "_supplementary_statistics.xlsx")
  )
  wb <- openxlsx::createWorkbook()
  sheet_names <- make_unique_sheet_names(vapply(entries, `[[`, character(1), "table_id"))
  index_df <- data.frame(
    sheet_name = sheet_names,
    table_id = vapply(entries, `[[`, character(1), "table_id"),
    panel_label = vapply(entries, `[[`, character(1), "panel_label"),
    table_title = vapply(entries, `[[`, character(1), "table_title"),
    caption = vapply(entries, `[[`, character(1), "caption"),
    notes = vapply(entries, `[[`, character(1), "notes"),
    source_csv_path = vapply(entries, function(x) path_list(x$source_csv_path), character(1)),
    output_csv_path = vapply(entries, function(x) to_repo_relative(x$output_csv_path), character(1)),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  openxlsx::addWorksheet(wb, "Index")
  openxlsx::writeData(wb, "Index", index_df, withFilter = TRUE)
  openxlsx::freezePane(wb, "Index", firstRow = TRUE)
  openxlsx::setColWidths(wb, "Index", cols = seq_len(ncol(index_df)), widths = "auto")

  workbook_map <- list()
  for (i in seq_along(entries)) {
    entry <- entries[[i]]
    sheet_name <- sheet_names[[i]]
    openxlsx::addWorksheet(wb, sheet_name)
    openxlsx::writeData(wb, sheet_name, entry$data, withFilter = TRUE)
    openxlsx::freezePane(wb, sheet_name, firstRow = TRUE)
    openxlsx::setColWidths(wb, sheet_name, cols = seq_len(ncol(entry$data)), widths = "auto")
    workbook_map[[length(workbook_map) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      table_id = entry$table_id,
      figure_file = figure_file,
      figure_label = figure_label,
      workbook_path = workbook_path,
      sheet_name = sheet_name,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  openxlsx::saveWorkbook(wb, workbook_path, overwrite = TRUE)
  dplyr::bind_rows(workbook_map)
}

fig_dir <- resolve_repo_path(params$fig_dir, must_exist = TRUE)
manual_root <- resolve_repo_path(params$manual_root, must_exist = TRUE)
runtime_hash <- params$runtime_hash
output_dir <- ensure_output_dir(resolve_repo_path(params$output_dir, must_exist = FALSE))

figure_map <- tibble::tibble(
  figure_file = c(
    "fig1.archetype_brain_maps.pdf",
    "fig2.patient_archetype_statistics.pdf",
    "fig3.archetype_eeg_microstate_relationship.pdf",
    "fig4.ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison.pdf"
  ),
  figure_label = c("Figure 1", "Figure 2", "Figure 3", "Figure 4"),
  manual_family = c(
    "archetype_brain_maps",
    "patient_archetype_statistics",
    "archetype_eeg_microstate_relationship",
    "ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison"
  ),
  final_figure_path = file.path(fig_dir, figure_file),
  manual_family_path = file.path(manual_root, manual_family)
)

missing_figures <- figure_map$figure_file[!file.exists(figure_map$final_figure_path)]
if (length(missing_figures) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Missing final figure PDF(s):", paste(missing_figures, collapse = ", ")))
}

missing_manual_dirs <- figure_map$manual_family_path[!dir.exists(figure_map$manual_family_path)]
if (length(missing_manual_dirs) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Missing manual output directories:", paste(missing_manual_dirs, collapse = ", ")))
}

fig_note_path <- file.path(fig_dir, "fig说明.txt")
fig_note_available <- file.exists(fig_note_path)

panel_map <- tibble::tibble(
  figure_file = c(
    rep("fig1.archetype_brain_maps.pdf", 4),
    rep("fig2.patient_archetype_statistics.pdf", 5),
    rep("fig3.archetype_eeg_microstate_relationship.pdf", 5),
    rep("fig4.ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison.pdf", 2)
  ),
  panel_label = c(
    "Figure 1A", "Figure 1B", "Figure 1C", "Figure 1D",
    "Figure 2A", "Figure 2B", "Figure 2C", "Figure 2D", "Figure 2E",
    "Figure 3A", "Figure 3B", "Figure 3C", "Figure 3D", "Figure 3E",
    "Figure 4A", "Figure 4B"
  ),
  panel_description = c(
    "Representative 19-channel EEG waveform and GFP peak trace.",
    "EEG microstate clustering templates and group microstate parameters.",
    "Representative SEEG waveform, retained channels, and peak/loading support.",
    "Four SEEG archetype Yeo17 loading templates.",
    "Yeo17 mean loadings for four SEEG archetypes.",
    "Coverage and support parameters across patients.",
    "Mean duration summaries and paired contrasts against archetype 0.",
    "Within-archetype patient assignment-similarity ranks.",
    "SEEG archetype transition probabilities.",
    "SEEG archetype and EEG microstate template spatial similarity.",
    "Archetype-conditioned EEG microstate preference and joint/conditional tendency.",
    "SEEG archetype to EEG switching probability effects.",
    "Fine-lag coupling from SEEG archetype to EEG microstate.",
    "Subject-level peak coupling effects.",
    "Stage-minus-IDE-A coverage and mean-duration effects for EEG microstates and SEEG archetypes.",
    "Stage-minus-IDE-A EEG-SEEG relationship and transition-tendency effects."
  )
)

source_file <- function(family, file_name) {
  file.path(manual_root, family, file_name)
}

archetype_stem <- paste0("patient_archetype_yeo17_summary_", runtime_hash)
relationship_stem <- paste0("seeg_archetype_eeg_microstate_", runtime_hash)
eeg_stem <- paste0("eeg_microstate_", runtime_hash)
maintext_stem <- paste0("maintext_validation_", runtime_hash)

add_pq_labels <- function(df) {
  if ("p_perm" %in% names(df)) {
    df$p_label <- format_p_value(df$p_perm)
  }
  if ("p_value" %in% names(df)) {
    df$p_label <- format_p_value(df$p_value)
  }
  if ("peak_p_perm" %in% names(df)) {
    df$peak_p_label <- format_p_value(df$peak_p_perm)
  }
  if ("q_fdr" %in% names(df)) {
    df$q_label <- format_q_value(df$q_fdr)
  }
  df
}

metric_value <- function(info_df, key, fallback = NA_character_) {
  value <- info_df$value[info_df$key == key]
  if (length(value) == 0) {
    return(fallback)
  }
  as.character(value[[1]])
}

make_projection_confidence_summary <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    group_by(condition, stage, stage_order, metric_family, state_label) %>%
    summarise(
      n_patients = dplyr::n_distinct(patient_id),
      mean_confidence = safe_mean(confidence),
      sd_confidence = safe_sd(confidence),
      median_confidence = safe_median(confidence),
      q1_confidence = safe_quantile(confidence, 0.25),
      q3_confidence = safe_quantile(confidence, 0.75),
      min_confidence = min(confidence, na.rm = TRUE),
      max_confidence = max(confidence, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(stage_order, metric_family, state_label)
}

make_dwell_contrasts <- function(parameter_long) {
  dwell <- parameter_long %>%
    filter(metric == "mean_dwell_ms" | metric_label == "Mean dwell time (ms)") %>%
    select(patient_id, archetype_label, value)
  dwell_wide <- dwell %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = archetype_label, values_from = value)
  archetype_levels <- sort(setdiff(names(dwell_wide), "patient_id"))
  reference <- archetype_levels[[1]]
  targets <- archetype_levels[-1]
  rows <- lapply(targets, function(target) {
    keep <- is.finite(dwell_wide[[reference]]) & is.finite(dwell_wide[[target]])
    diff_values <- dwell_wide[[target]][keep] - dwell_wide[[reference]][keep]
    n_pairs <- length(diff_values)
    if (n_pairs > 1) {
      test <- t.test(diff_values)
      t_stat <- unname(test$statistic)
      p_value <- unname(test$p.value)
      ci_low <- unname(test$conf.int[[1]])
      ci_high <- unname(test$conf.int[[2]])
    } else {
      t_stat <- NA_real_
      p_value <- NA_real_
      ci_low <- NA_real_
      ci_high <- NA_real_
    }
    data.frame(
      contrast = paste(target, "minus", reference),
      n_pairs = n_pairs,
      reference_archetype = reference,
      target_archetype = target,
      reference_mean_ms = safe_mean(dwell_wide[[reference]][keep]),
      target_mean_ms = safe_mean(dwell_wide[[target]][keep]),
      mean_difference_ms = safe_mean(diff_values),
      sd_difference_ms = safe_sd(diff_values),
      se_difference_ms = ifelse(n_pairs > 1, safe_sd(diff_values) / sqrt(n_pairs), NA_real_),
      ci_low_ms = ci_low,
      ci_high_ms = ci_high,
      t_statistic = t_stat,
      p_value = p_value,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })
  out <- dplyr::bind_rows(rows)
  out$q_fdr <- p.adjust(out$p_value, method = "BH")
  add_pq_labels(out)
}

make_assignment_rank_table <- function(parameter_long) {
  aliases <- parameter_long %>%
    distinct(patient_id) %>%
    arrange(patient_id) %>%
    mutate(patient_alias = sprintf("sub-%02d", dplyr::row_number()))
  parameter_long %>%
    filter(metric == "assignment_similarity" | metric_label == "Assignment similarity") %>%
    left_join(aliases, by = "patient_id") %>%
    group_by(archetype_label) %>%
    arrange(desc(value), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(rank = dplyr::row_number()) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    transmute(
      archetype_label,
      rank,
      patient_alias,
      assignment_similarity = value
    )
}

# Figure 1 sources and tables.
eeg_info_path <- source_file("eeg_microstate_overview", paste0(eeg_stem, "_waveform_segment_info.csv"))
eeg_gfp_path <- source_file("eeg_microstate_overview", paste0(eeg_stem, "_waveform_gfp_peaks.csv"))
eeg_group_path <- source_file("eeg_microstate_overview", paste0(eeg_stem, "_group_parameters.csv"))
eeg_template_path <- source_file("eeg_microstate_overview", paste0(eeg_stem, "_template_values.csv"))

eeg_info <- read_required_csv(eeg_info_path, c("key", "value"), "Figure 1A EEG waveform segment info")
eeg_gfp <- read_required_csv(eeg_gfp_path, c("relative_time_ms", "gfp_uv", "is_peak"), "Figure 1A EEG GFP peaks")
eeg_group <- read_required_csv(eeg_group_path, c("microstate_label", "count", "mean", "std", "median", "metric", "metric_label"), "Figure 1B EEG microstate group parameters")
eeg_templates <- read_required_csv(eeg_template_path, c("microstate_label", "channel", "value"), "Figure 1B EEG template values")

eeg_peak_flags <- as_logical_flag(eeg_gfp$is_peak)
fig1a_table <- tibble::tibble(
  statistic = c(
    "source_patient",
    "start_sec",
    "end_sec",
    "duration_sec",
    "sampling_frequency_hz",
    "n_channels",
    "n_samples",
    "n_gfp_peaks",
    "mean_gfp_uV",
    "median_gfp_uV",
    "max_gfp_uV"
  ),
  value = c(
    metric_value(eeg_info, "patient_id"),
    format_mixed_value(metric_value(eeg_info, "start_sec")),
    format_mixed_value(metric_value(eeg_info, "end_sec")),
    format_mixed_value(metric_value(eeg_info, "duration_sec")),
    format_mixed_value(metric_value(eeg_info, "sfreq")),
    format_mixed_value(metric_value(eeg_info, "n_channels"), digits = 0),
    format_mixed_value(metric_value(eeg_info, "n_samples"), digits = 0),
    format_mixed_value(sum(eeg_peak_flags, na.rm = TRUE), digits = 0),
    format_mixed_value(safe_mean(eeg_gfp$gfp_uv)),
    format_mixed_value(safe_median(eeg_gfp$gfp_uv)),
    format_mixed_value(max(eeg_gfp$gfp_uv, na.rm = TRUE))
  ),
  unit = c("", "s", "s", "s", "Hz", "channels", "samples", "peaks", "uV", "uV", "uV")
)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig1a_eeg_waveform_gfp_summary",
  figure_file = "fig1.archetype_brain_maps.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 1A",
  table_title = "EEG waveform and GFP peak summary",
  caption = "Table S1A. Descriptive support for the representative EEG waveform and GFP peak panel.",
  source_csv_path = c(attr(eeg_info, "source_path"), attr(eeg_gfp, "source_path")),
  df = fig1a_table,
  notes = "Illustrative example segment; values are descriptive and no inferential test is implied."
)

fig1b_params <- eeg_group %>%
  select(microstate_label, metric_label, count, mean, std, median, min, max) %>%
  arrange(metric_label, microstate_label)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig1b_eeg_microstate_group_parameters",
  figure_file = "fig1.archetype_brain_maps.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 1B",
  table_title = "EEG microstate group parameters",
  caption = "Table S1B. Group-level EEG microstate parameter summaries corresponding to Figure 1B.",
  source_csv_path = attr(eeg_group, "source_path"),
  df = fig1b_params,
  notes = "Descriptive group summaries across subjects."
)

fig1b_templates <- eeg_templates %>%
  select(microstate_label, channel, value) %>%
  arrange(microstate_label, channel)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig1b_eeg_microstate_template_values",
  figure_file = "fig1.archetype_brain_maps.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 1B",
  table_title = "EEG microstate template channel weights",
  caption = "Table S1C. Channel-level EEG microstate template weights displayed in Figure 1B.",
  source_csv_path = attr(eeg_templates, "source_path"),
  df = fig1b_templates,
  notes = "Template weights are exported source values rather than inferential statistics."
)

seeg_info_path <- find_optional_file(file.path(params$manual_root, "seeg_peak_segments", "*_segment_info.csv"))
seeg_peak_path <- find_optional_file(file.path(params$manual_root, "seeg_peak_segments", "*_peak_summary.csv"))
seeg_channel_path <- find_optional_file(file.path(params$manual_root, "seeg_peak_segments", "*_channel_layout.csv"))

if (nzchar(seeg_info_path) && nzchar(seeg_peak_path)) {
  seeg_info <- read_required_csv(seeg_info_path, c("key", "value"), "Figure 1C SEEG segment info")
  seeg_peak <- read_required_csv(seeg_peak_path, c("peak_id", "event_sec", "peak_metric_value", "peak_metric", "normalization", "n_channels_used"), "Figure 1C SEEG peak summary")
  fig1c_segment <- tibble::tibble(
    statistic = c(
      "source_patient",
      "start_sec",
      "end_sec",
      "duration_sec",
      "n_input_channels",
      "n_export_channels",
      "n_samples",
      "sample_period_sec",
      "peak_metric",
      "normalization",
      "n_detected_peaks",
      "mean_peak_metric",
      "median_peak_metric",
      "max_peak_metric"
    ),
    value = c(
      metric_value(seeg_info, "patient_id"),
      format_mixed_value(metric_value(seeg_info, "start_sec")),
      format_mixed_value(metric_value(seeg_info, "end_sec")),
      format_mixed_value(metric_value(seeg_info, "duration_sec")),
      format_mixed_value(metric_value(seeg_info, "n_input_channels"), digits = 0),
      format_mixed_value(metric_value(seeg_info, "n_export_channels", metric_value(seeg_info, "n_channels")), digits = 0),
      format_mixed_value(metric_value(seeg_info, "n_samples"), digits = 0),
      format_mixed_value(metric_value(seeg_info, "sample_period_sec"), digits = 4),
      metric_value(seeg_info, "peak_metric"),
      metric_value(seeg_info, "normalization"),
      format_mixed_value(nrow(seeg_peak), digits = 0),
      format_mixed_value(safe_mean(seeg_peak$peak_metric_value)),
      format_mixed_value(safe_median(seeg_peak$peak_metric_value)),
      format_mixed_value(max(seeg_peak$peak_metric_value, na.rm = TRUE))
    ),
    unit = c("", "s", "s", "s", "channels", "channels", "samples", "s", "", "", "peaks", "metric units", "metric units", "metric units")
  )
  write_supplement_table(
    table_id = "fig1c_seeg_waveform_peak_summary",
    figure_file = "fig1.archetype_brain_maps.pdf",
    panel_label = "Figure 1C",
    table_title = "SEEG waveform and peak-metric summary",
    caption = "Table S1D. Descriptive support for the representative SEEG waveform and retained peak metric panel.",
    source_csv_path = c(attr(seeg_info, "source_path"), attr(seeg_peak, "source_path")),
    df = fig1c_segment,
    notes = "Illustrative example segment; values summarize the exported waveform support table."
  )
} else {
  register_skipped_table(
    table_id = "fig1c_seeg_waveform_peak_summary",
    figure_file = "fig1.archetype_brain_maps.pdf",
    panel_label = "Figure 1C",
    table_title = "SEEG waveform and peak-metric summary",
    caption = "Table S1D. Descriptive support for the representative SEEG waveform and retained peak metric panel.",
    source_csv_path = c(seeg_info_path, seeg_peak_path),
    notes = "Optional SEEG peak-segment CSV exports were not available; no statistics were fabricated from the figure artwork."
  )
}

if (nzchar(seeg_channel_path)) {
  seeg_channels <- read_required_csv(seeg_channel_path, c("bipolar_channel", "region", "valid_same_region"), "Figure 1C SEEG channel layout")
  fig1c_channels <- seeg_channels %>%
    mutate(valid_same_region = as_logical_flag(valid_same_region)) %>%
    group_by(region) %>%
    summarise(
      n_bipolar_channels = dplyr::n_distinct(bipolar_channel),
      n_valid_same_region = sum(valid_same_region, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(n_bipolar_channels), region)
  write_supplement_table(
    table_id = "fig1c_seeg_region_channel_support",
    figure_file = "fig1.archetype_brain_maps.pdf",
    panel_label = "Figure 1C",
    table_title = "SEEG regional channel support",
    caption = "Table S1E. Regional bipolar-channel support for the representative SEEG waveform/export in Figure 1C.",
    source_csv_path = attr(seeg_channels, "source_path"),
    df = fig1c_channels,
    notes = "Region labels are inherited from the exported SEEG channel-layout table."
  )
} else {
  register_skipped_table(
    table_id = "fig1c_seeg_region_channel_support",
    figure_file = "fig1.archetype_brain_maps.pdf",
    panel_label = "Figure 1C",
    table_title = "SEEG regional channel support",
    caption = "Table S1E. Regional bipolar-channel support for the representative SEEG waveform/export in Figure 1C.",
    source_csv_path = seeg_channel_path,
    notes = "Optional SEEG channel-layout CSV export was not available."
  )
}

fig1d_source <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("archetype_brain_maps", paste0(archetype_stem, "_ggseg_summary_long.csv")),
  c("archetype_label", "network", "mean_loading", "support_n", "support_fraction", "n_patients"),
  "Figure 1D archetype Yeo17 map summary"
)

fig1d_table <- fig1d_source %>%
  select(archetype_label, network, mean_loading, support_n, support_fraction, n_patients) %>%
  arrange(archetype_label, network)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig1d_archetype_yeo17_loading_summary",
  figure_file = "fig1.archetype_brain_maps.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 1D",
  table_title = "SEEG archetype Yeo17 loading templates",
  caption = "Table S1F. Yeo17 network loading summaries for the four SEEG archetype templates in Figure 1D.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig1d_source, "source_path"),
  df = fig1d_table,
  notes = "Mean loadings are computed from the exported patient-archetype Yeo17 summary."
)

# Figure 2 sources and tables.
fig2_network <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("patient_archetype_statistics", paste0(archetype_stem, "_yeo17_network_loading_summary.csv")),
  c("archetype_label", "network", "n_support", "mean_loading", "sd_loading", "median_loading", "abs_rank"),
  "Figure 2A Yeo17 loading summary"
)
fig2_param_summary <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("patient_archetype_statistics", paste0(archetype_stem, "_parameter_summary_stats.csv")),
  c("metric_label", "archetype_label", "mean", "sd", "median", "q1", "q3", "min", "max"),
  "Figure 2 parameter summary"
)
fig2_param_long <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("patient_archetype_statistics", paste0(archetype_stem, "_parameter_long.csv")),
  c("patient_id", "archetype_label", "metric", "metric_label", "value"),
  "Figure 2 parameter long table"
)
fig2_transition <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("maintext_validation", paste0(maintext_stem, "_field_state_transition_group.csv")),
  c("from_state", "to_state", "n_subjects", "mean_transition_probability", "median_transition_probability", "total_transitions"),
  "Figure 2E field-state transition group table"
)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig2a_yeo17_archetype_loading_statistics",
  figure_file = "fig2.patient_archetype_statistics.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 2A",
  table_title = "Yeo17 network loadings by SEEG archetype",
  caption = "Table S2A. Yeo17 loading summary statistics for the archetype loading heatmap in Figure 2A.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig2_network, "source_path"),
  df = fig2_network %>% arrange(archetype_label, abs_rank, network),
  notes = "The rank column orders networks by absolute mean loading within each archetype."
)

fig2b_metrics <- c("Occupancy (%)", "Peak maps (n)", "Covered Yeo17 networks", "Mapped bipolar channels")
fig2b_table <- fig2_param_summary %>%
  filter(metric_label %in% fig2b_metrics) %>%
  arrange(metric_label, archetype_label)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig2b_patient_coverage_support_statistics",
  figure_file = "fig2.patient_archetype_statistics.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 2B",
  table_title = "Patient-level coverage and support summaries",
  caption = "Table S2B. Coverage and support statistics corresponding to Figure 2B.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig2_param_summary, "source_path"),
  df = fig2b_table,
  notes = "Rows summarize patient-level values within each archetype."
)

fig2c_summary <- fig2_param_summary %>%
  filter(metric_label == "Mean dwell time (ms)") %>%
  arrange(archetype_label)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig2c_mean_duration_descriptive_statistics",
  figure_file = "fig2.patient_archetype_statistics.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 2C",
  table_title = "Mean duration descriptive statistics",
  caption = "Table S2C. Archetype-level mean-duration descriptive statistics for Figure 2C.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig2_param_summary, "source_path"),
  df = fig2c_summary,
  notes = "Mean duration is reported in milliseconds."
)

fig2c_contrasts <- make_dwell_contrasts(fig2_param_long)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig2c_mean_duration_paired_contrasts_vs_a0",
  figure_file = "fig2.patient_archetype_statistics.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 2C",
  table_title = "Paired mean-duration contrasts versus archetype 0",
  caption = "Table S2D. Patient-paired mean-duration contrasts comparing each archetype against the A0 reference.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig2_param_long, "source_path"),
  df = fig2c_contrasts,
  notes = "Paired tests use patient-level dwell times exported by the Figure 2 statistics workflow; q_fdr is Benjamini-Hochberg adjusted across contrasts."
)

fig2d_ranks <- make_assignment_rank_table(fig2_param_long)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig2d_assignment_similarity_patient_ranks",
  figure_file = "fig2.patient_archetype_statistics.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 2D",
  table_title = "Within-archetype patient ranks",
  caption = "Table S2E. Within-archetype patient ranks by assignment similarity for Figure 2D.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig2_param_long, "source_path"),
  df = fig2d_ranks,
  notes = "Patient identifiers are replaced by stable aliases generated within this supplement workflow."
)

fig2e_table <- fig2_transition %>%
  mutate(
    from_label = archetype_label(from_state),
    to_label = archetype_label(to_state),
    mean_transition_percent = mean_transition_probability * 100,
    median_transition_percent = median_transition_probability * 100
  ) %>%
  select(from_label, to_label, n_subjects, mean_transition_percent, median_transition_percent, total_transitions) %>%
  arrange(from_label, to_label)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig2e_archetype_transition_probabilities",
  figure_file = "fig2.patient_archetype_statistics.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 2E",
  table_title = "SEEG archetype transition probabilities",
  caption = "Table S2F. Group transition probabilities between SEEG archetypes corresponding to Figure 2E.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig2_transition, "source_path"),
  df = fig2e_table,
  notes = "Transition probabilities are reported as percentages."
)

# Figure 3 sources and tables.
fig3_template <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("archetype_eeg_microstate_relationship", paste0(relationship_stem, "_template_similarity_matrix.csv")),
  c("archetype_label", "microstate_label", "n_subjects", "mean_similarity", "median_similarity", "min_similarity"),
  "Figure 3A template similarity matrix"
)
fig3_preference <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("archetype_eeg_microstate_relationship", paste0(relationship_stem, "_state_preference_matrix.csv")),
  c("archetype_label", "microstate_label", "n_subjects", "effect_pp", "conditional_pct", "baseline_pct", "p_perm", "q_fdr"),
  "Figure 3B state preference matrix"
)
fig3_switching <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("archetype_eeg_microstate_relationship", paste0(relationship_stem, "_archetype_to_eeg_switching_any.csv")),
  c("from_label", "to_label", "response_kind", "n_subjects", "effect_pp", "p_perm", "q_fdr"),
  "Figure 3C switching effects"
)
fig3_lag <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("archetype_eeg_microstate_relationship", paste0(relationship_stem, "_fine_lag_curve.csv")),
  c("lag_ms", "n_subjects", "effect_x1000", "observed_x1000", "null_x1000", "p_perm", "q_fdr"),
  "Figure 3D fine-lag curve"
)
fig3_peaks <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("archetype_eeg_microstate_relationship", paste0(relationship_stem, "_subject_peak_summary_anonymized.csv")),
  c("patient_alias", "peak_lag_ms", "peak_effect_x1000", "peak_width_ms", "peak_p_perm"),
  "Figure 3E subject peak summary"
)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig3a_template_spatial_similarity",
  figure_file = "fig3.archetype_eeg_microstate_relationship.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 3A",
  table_title = "Template spatial similarity",
  caption = "Table S3A. SEEG archetype by EEG microstate template spatial similarity values for Figure 3A.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig3_template, "source_path"),
  df = fig3_template %>%
    select(archetype_label, microstate_label, n_subjects, mean_similarity, median_similarity, min_similarity) %>%
    arrange(archetype_label, microstate_label),
  notes = "Similarity values are source-table summaries across subjects."
)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig3b_state_preference_joint_tendency",
  figure_file = "fig3.archetype_eeg_microstate_relationship.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 3B",
  table_title = "Archetype-conditioned EEG microstate preference",
  caption = "Table S3B. Conditional EEG microstate preference effects and permutation statistics for Figure 3B.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig3_preference, "source_path"),
  df = add_pq_labels(fig3_preference) %>%
    select(archetype_label, microstate_label, n_subjects, effect_pp, conditional_pct, baseline_pct, mean_joint_samples, mean_state_samples, p_perm, p_label, q_fdr, q_label) %>%
    arrange(archetype_label, microstate_label),
  notes = "Effects are in percentage points; q_fdr is FDR-adjusted across matrix cells."
)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig3c_archetype_to_eeg_switching_effects",
  figure_file = "fig3.archetype_eeg_microstate_relationship.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 3C",
  table_title = "SEEG archetype to EEG switching effects",
  caption = "Table S3C. SEEG archetype transition effects on EEG switching probability for Figure 3C.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig3_switching, "source_path"),
  df = add_pq_labels(fig3_switching) %>%
    select(from_label, to_label, response_kind, response_state, n_subjects, effect_pp, p_perm, p_label, q_fdr, q_label) %>%
    arrange(from_label, to_label),
  notes = "Effects are in percentage points; q_fdr is FDR-adjusted across transition cells."
)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig3d_fine_lag_coupling_curve",
  figure_file = "fig3.archetype_eeg_microstate_relationship.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 3D",
  table_title = "Fine-lag coupling curve",
  caption = "Table S3D. Fine-lag coupling statistics from SEEG archetypes to EEG microstates for Figure 3D.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig3_lag, "source_path"),
  df = add_pq_labels(fig3_lag) %>%
    select(lag_ms, n_subjects, effect_x1000, observed_x1000, null_x1000, p_perm, p_label, q_fdr, q_label, is_fdr_significant) %>%
    arrange(lag_ms),
  notes = "Effects and coupling values are scaled by 1000 for display consistency with the figure."
)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig3e_subject_peak_coupling_effects",
  figure_file = "fig3.archetype_eeg_microstate_relationship.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 3E",
  table_title = "Subject peak coupling effects",
  caption = "Table S3E. Anonymized subject-level peak-lag and coupling-effect summaries for Figure 3E.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig3_peaks, "source_path"),
  df = add_pq_labels(fig3_peaks) %>%
    select(patient_alias, peak_lag_ms, peak_effect_x1000, peak_width_ms, peak_p_perm, peak_p_label, peak_observed_coupling, peak_null_mean_coupling, n_lags) %>%
    arrange(patient_alias),
  notes = "Subject labels are anonymized aliases from the source table."
)

# Figure 4 sources and tables.
fig4_primary <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison", "ide_a_vs_sz_primary_group_effects.csv"),
  c("metric_family", "stage", "stage_order", "metric_label", "state_label", "n_patients", "mean_delta", "ci_low", "ci_high", "unit"),
  "Figure 4A primary group effects"
)
fig4_complete <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison", "ide_a_vs_sz_complete_case_support.csv"),
  c("metric_family", "metric", "metric_label", "state_label", "n_any_matched", "n_complete_all_stages", "complete_fraction"),
  "Figure 4 complete-case support"
)
fig4_denominator <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison", "ide_a_vs_sz_denominator_qc.csv"),
  c("metric_family", "condition", "stage", "stage_order", "n_patients", "n_seizures", "n_matched_patients"),
  "Figure 4 denominator QC"
)
fig4_duration <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison", "ide_a_vs_sz_stage_duration_qc.csv"),
  c("stage", "stage_order", "seizure_type", "n_patients", "n_recordings", "n_segments", "n_usable", "median_duration_sec", "q1_duration_sec", "q3_duration_sec", "mean_duration_sec"),
  "Figure 4 stage duration QC"
)
fig4_projection <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison", "ide_a_vs_sz_projection_confidence_qc.csv"),
  c("patient_id", "condition", "stage", "stage_order", "metric_family", "state_label", "confidence"),
  "Figure 4 projection confidence QC"
)
fig4_yeo <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison", "ide_a_vs_sz_yeo17_loading_group_effects.csv"),
  c("metric_family", "stage", "stage_order", "state_label", "assigned_archetype", "network", "n_patients", "mean_delta", "ci_low", "ci_high"),
  "Figure 4 Yeo17 loading effects"
)
fig4_relationship <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison", "ide_a_vs_sz_relationship_group_effects.csv"),
  c("metric_family", "stage", "stage_order", "assigned_archetype", "microstate", "state_label", "n_patients", "mean_delta", "ci_low", "ci_high", "unit"),
  "Figure 4B relationship effects"
)
fig4_seizure_type <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison", "ide_a_vs_sz_seizure_type_group_effects.csv"),
  c("seizure_type", "metric_family", "stage", "stage_order", "metric_label", "state_label", "n_patients", "mean_delta", "ci_low", "ci_high", "unit"),
  "Figure 4 seizure-type group effects"
)
fig4_sensitivity <- read_required_csv(
  source_file("ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison", "ide_a_vs_sz_repeated_seizure_sensitivity.csv"),
  c("sensitivity_method", "metric_family", "stage", "stage_order", "metric_label", "state_label", "n_patients", "mean_delta", "plot_mean_delta"),
  "Figure 4 repeated-seizure sensitivity"
)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig4a_primary_stage_minus_idea_group_effects",
  figure_file = "fig4.ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 4A",
  table_title = "Primary stage-minus-IDE-A group effects",
  caption = "Table S4A. Primary EEG microstate and SEEG archetype stage-minus-IDE-A group effects for Figure 4A.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig4_primary, "source_path"),
  df = fig4_primary %>%
    select(metric_family, stage, stage_order, metric_label, state_label, n_patients, mean_value, mean_baseline, mean_delta, sd_delta, se_delta, ci_low, ci_high, plot_mean_delta, plot_ci_low, plot_ci_high, unit) %>%
    arrange(metric_family, metric_label, stage_order, state_label),
  notes = "Delta values are matched patient stage-minus-IDE-A contrasts; plot_* columns use the figure display scale."
)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig4a_complete_case_support",
  figure_file = "fig4.ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 4A",
  table_title = "Complete-case support",
  caption = "Table S4B. Complete-case support for stage-minus-IDE-A contrasts.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig4_complete, "source_path"),
  df = fig4_complete %>% arrange(metric_family, metric_label, state_label),
  notes = "Complete fractions indicate support across all seizure stages."
)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig4a_denominator_qc",
  figure_file = "fig4.ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 4A",
  table_title = "Denominator QC",
  caption = "Table S4C. Patient and seizure denominators for IDE-A and seizure-stage comparisons.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig4_denominator, "source_path"),
  df = fig4_denominator %>% arrange(metric_family, condition, stage_order),
  notes = "Rows report available matched patients and seizure counts before contrast aggregation."
)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig4a_stage_duration_qc",
  figure_file = "fig4.ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 4A",
  table_title = "Stage duration QC",
  caption = "Table S4D. Seizure-stage duration summaries supporting the Figure 4A stage windows.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig4_duration, "source_path"),
  df = fig4_duration %>% arrange(stage_order, seizure_type),
  notes = "Durations are reported in seconds."
)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig4a_projection_confidence_qc",
  figure_file = "fig4.ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 4A",
  table_title = "Projection confidence QC",
  caption = "Table S4E. Projection-confidence summaries by stage, metric family, and state.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig4_projection, "source_path"),
  df = make_projection_confidence_summary(fig4_projection),
  notes = "Summaries are computed from the exported patient-level projection-confidence table."
)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig4a_yeo17_loading_stage_delta_effects",
  figure_file = "fig4.ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 4A",
  table_title = "Yeo17 loading stage-delta effects",
  caption = "Table S4F. Yeo17 network loading stage-minus-IDE-A effects used as secondary anatomical support.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig4_yeo, "source_path"),
  df = fig4_yeo %>%
    select(metric_family, stage, stage_order, state_label, assigned_archetype, network, n_patients, mean_value, mean_baseline, mean_delta, sd_delta, se_delta, ci_low, ci_high) %>%
    arrange(stage_order, state_label, network),
  notes = "These rows support secondary Yeo17 loading interpretation and are not derived from figure artwork."
)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig4b_relationship_stage_delta_effects",
  figure_file = "fig4.ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 4B",
  table_title = "EEG-SEEG relationship stage-delta effects",
  caption = "Table S4G. Stage-minus-IDE-A EEG-SEEG relationship effects corresponding to Figure 4B.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig4_relationship, "source_path"),
  df = fig4_relationship %>%
    select(metric_family, stage, stage_order, assigned_archetype, microstate, state_label, n_patients, mean_value, mean_baseline, mean_delta, sd_delta, se_delta, ci_low, ci_high, plot_mean_delta, plot_ci_low, plot_ci_high, unit) %>%
    arrange(stage_order, assigned_archetype, microstate),
  notes = "Relationship effects are reported on the source scale and in plot-scale percentage points where available."
)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig4b_seizure_type_stratified_effects",
  figure_file = "fig4.ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 4B",
  table_title = "Seizure-type stratified stage effects",
  caption = "Table S4H. Seizure-type stratified group effects supporting Figure 4 interpretation.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig4_seizure_type, "source_path"),
  df = fig4_seizure_type %>%
    select(seizure_type, metric_family, stage, stage_order, metric_label, state_label, n_patients, mean_delta, sd_delta, se_delta, ci_low, ci_high, plot_mean_delta, plot_ci_low, plot_ci_high, unit) %>%
    arrange(seizure_type, metric_family, metric_label, stage_order, state_label),
  notes = "Rows are observational strata and should not be interpreted as independent causal effects."
)

write_supplement_table(
  table_id = "fig4b_repeated_seizure_sensitivity",
  figure_file = "fig4.ide_a_vs_seizure_stage_comparison.pdf",
  panel_label = "Figure 4B",
  table_title = "Repeated-seizure sensitivity",
  caption = "Table S4I. Repeated-seizure sensitivity summaries for the stage-minus-IDE-A analysis.",
  source_csv_path = attr(fig4_sensitivity, "source_path"),
  df = fig4_sensitivity %>%
    arrange(sensitivity_method, metric_family, metric_label, stage_order, state_label),
  notes = "Sensitivity summaries reuse the maintained Figure 4 CSV export."
)

manifest_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(manifest_rows) %>%
  arrange(figure_file, panel_label, table_id)

workbook_map_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(figure_map$figure_file, function(fig) {
  entries <- table_registry[vapply(table_registry, `[[`, character(1), "figure_file") == fig]
  figure_label <- figure_map$figure_label[figure_map$figure_file == fig][[1]]
  write_figure_workbook(fig, figure_label, entries)
})) %>%
  mutate(
    workbook_path = ifelse(nzchar(workbook_path), to_repo_relative(workbook_path), "")
  )

if (nrow(workbook_map_df) > 0) {
  manifest_df <- manifest_df %>%
    left_join(
      workbook_map_df %>% select(table_id, workbook_path, sheet_name),
      by = "table_id"
    )
} else {
  manifest_df$workbook_path <- ""
  manifest_df$sheet_name <- ""
}

manifest_df <- manifest_df %>%
  mutate(
    workbook_path = ifelse(is.na(workbook_path), "", workbook_path),
    sheet_name = ifelse(is.na(sheet_name), "", sheet_name)
  )

manifest_path <- file.path(output_dir, "supplementary_figure_statistics_manifest.csv")
write.csv(manifest_df, manifest_path, row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
```

## Workflow Inputs

```{r workflow-inputs}
knitr::kable(
  data.frame(
    item = c("fig_dir", "manual_root", "runtime_hash", "output_dir", "figure_note_file", "manifest"),
    value = c(
      to_repo_relative(fig_dir),
      to_repo_relative(manual_root),
      runtime_hash,
      to_repo_relative(output_dir),
      ifelse(fig_note_available, to_repo_relative(fig_note_path), "not found"),
      to_repo_relative(manifest_path)
    )
  ),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = "class=\"three-line-table\"",
  caption = "Table S0. Supplementary figure statistics workflow inputs."
)
```

## Figure And Panel Mapping

```{r figure-mapping}
mapping_table <- figure_map %>%
  select(figure_label, figure_file, manual_family) %>%
  left_join(panel_map, by = "figure_file") %>%
  select(figure_label, figure_file, manual_family, panel_label, panel_description)

knitr::kable(
  mapping_table,
  format = "html",
  table.attr = "class=\"three-line-table\"",
  caption = "Table S0A. Final figure-to-manual-output and panel mapping used by this workflow."
)
```

## Supplementary Tables

```{r render-supplement-tables, results='asis'}
registry_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(table_registry, function(x) {
  data.frame(
    table_id = x$table_id,
    figure_file = x$figure_file,
    panel_label = x$panel_label,
    table_title = x$table_title,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
})) %>%
  arrange(figure_file, panel_label, table_id)

for (fig in unique(registry_df$figure_file)) {
  fig_label <- figure_map$figure_label[figure_map$figure_file == fig][[1]]
  cat("\n\n### ", fig_label, ": ", fig, "\n\n", sep = "")
  fig_tables <- registry_df$table_id[registry_df$figure_file == fig]
  for (table_id in fig_tables) {
    entry <- table_registry[[table_id]]
    cat("\n\n#### ", entry$panel_label, " - ", entry$table_title, "\n\n", sep = "")
    if (nzchar(entry$notes)) {
      cat("*Note.* ", entry$notes, "\n\n", sep = "")
    }
    cat(
      knitr::kable(
        format_display_table(entry$data),
        format = "html",
        table.attr = "class=\"three-line-table\"",
        caption = entry$caption,
        escape = TRUE
      ),
      "\n\n",
      sep = ""
    )
  }
}
```

## Source Availability Notes

```{r source-notes}
note_rows <- manifest_df %>%
  filter(status != "generated" | nzchar(notes)) %>%
  select(table_id, status, figure_file, panel_label, source_csv_path, output_csv_path, notes)

knitr::kable(
  note_rows,
  format = "html",
  table.attr = "class=\"three-line-table\"",
  caption = "Table S0B. Source availability and interpretation notes for generated or skipped supplementary tables."
)
```

## Output Manifest

```{r output-manifest}
knitr::kable(
  manifest_df,
  format = "html",
  table.attr = "class=\"three-line-table\"",
  caption = "Table S0C. Audit manifest for supplementary figure statistics tables."
)
```
